name: Kubernetes Secrets Modified or Deleted
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: kelnage
SIGMA Title: Kubernetes Secrets Modified or Deleted
SIGMA Description: Detects when Kubernetes Secrets are Modified or Deleted.


False positives:
- Secrets being modified or deleted may be performed by a system administrator.
- Automated processes may need to take these actions and may need to be filtered.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%secrets%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%patch%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%update%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Kubernetes Secrets Modified or Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%secrets%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%patch%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%update%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Kubernetes Secrets Modified or Deleted
